opposite direction to Mars, it amounts that mars will always leave
an arrow towards Venus causing health problems and also
dangerous I perilious situations.
Female Chart 6708
v
OJANDRA RAHU
SUKRA
RAVI
ROHINI 2
SANI BUDHA
KETU KUJA
In this chart, Saturn the significator of Profession is posited in
Makara (South). Ketu is posited in Dhanus in East behind

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI AS1ROLOGY 93
Saturn, 2nd house to Saturn in Mithuna a West Sign, Rahu is
posited. With this Saturn does not have any benefic planets on
either side of him. In addition to his, Moon is posited in the same
direction of Saturn i.e. in South in in Vrishabha. so, she does not
have any assured income. Hardships are plenty without any
respite.
The Planets Mars + Saturn + Moon is in one direction
amounting to'be in one sign. Since the significator of husband
Mars is combined with Saturn +Moon, her husband will be
wandering.
